title: Claude for Startups
description: Claude for Startups offers founders community and technical resources, with selected startups receiving Claude API credits and priority rate limits.
eligibility: Any early-stage founder or startup building with Claude may join; credit eligibility requires meeting Anthropic's current company-age, funding, account, and prior-credit requirements.
value: Community and resources, plus potential Claude API credits and priority rate limits for selected startups
regions: Global, subject to Anthropic availability and program terms
